description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in OpenMairie openAnnuaire 2.00, when register_globals is enabled, allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the path_om parameter to (1) annuaire.class.php, (2) droit.class.php, (3) collectivite.class.php, (4) profil.class.php, (5) direction.class.php, (6) service.class.php, (7) directiongenerale.class.php, and (8) utilisateur.class.php in obj/.
